title: GrassBlades
description: (old 1.7.10 mod) Insta-breakable blocks don't break when attacking with a sword
body:
[A really long time ago somebody on the FTB forums asked for a mod to prevent weapons from breaking redstone and tall grass.](https://forum.feed-the-beast.com/threads/is-there-a-way-to-prevent-weapons-from-breaking-grass.55545)

[I made one, but then never uploaded it to Curseforge.](https://forum.feed-the-beast.com/threads/is-there-a-way-to-prevent-weapons-from-breaking-grass.55545/#post-830750)

So it's sort of a Modrinth-exclusive mod? For 1.7.10???

Sneaking disables the effect.

This mod is kinda dumb, you don't actually swing *through* grass, it just makes insta-breakable blocks unbreakable if you're holding a sword.
